// note: This manifest is MIT-0-licensed. The InvestorClaw service it points to is Apache 2.0. Schema field names below reflect the Claude Code marketplace conventions as understood at v4.1 release; fields marked TODO need final verification against the published marketplace schema before listing submission.
name: investorclaw
description: Portfolio analysis via local Docker service. Adds /ask and /refresh slash commands plus 15 MCP tools for holdings, performance, bonds, optimization, and more. Educational only — never investment advice.

skill.// note: Path to the SKILL.md the plugin loads into Claude Code's skill catalog.

slashCommands.name: ask
slashCommands.description: Ask InvestorClaw a portfolio question (deterministic engine).
slashCommands.// TODO: confirm slash-command-to-MCP-to: may be 'tool', 'mcpTool', 'invokes', or require a small handler script depending on schema version

question.description: Natural-language portfolio question (e.g., 'what are my top dividend payers?')

slashCommands.name: refresh
slashCommands.description: Refresh market data without re-uploading portfolio files.

investorclaw.// note: Portfolio analysis tools. Service runs in user's Docker (mnemos-os/ic-engine:4.1.33-cpu).

mnemos.// note: Memory + knowledge graph. Service runs in user's Docker (mnemos-os/mnemos-rs:4.2).

prerequisites.// note: Plugin does NOT auto-install Docker. INSTALL.md gives the user the brew/winget/get-docker.com command per platform.

postInstall.message:
InvestorClaw plugin installed. To finish setup, run:

  mkdir -p ~/.investorclaw
  curl -sSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mnemos-os/mnemos-ic-runtime/v4.1.27/compose.yml > ~/.investorclaw/compose.yml
  cd ~/.investorclaw && docker compose up -d

Then open http://localhost:18092 to upload a portfolio. See INSTALL.md for full details.
